attributes.description: Amcache Application Enriched: Full application forensics view joining application inventory, file details, and Start Menu shortcuts from the Windows Amcache.hve registry hive. Combines elastic_amcache_applications_view (InventoryApplication + InventoryApplicationFile) with InventoryApplicationShortcut via program_id. Provides a single-query view of every installed application with its associated binary files and shortcut launch points. NOTE: Execution must be corroborated with additional artifacts (Prefetch, ShimCache, UserAssist).
attributes.query:
-- Amcache Application Enriched: App inventory + file details + shortcuts
-- Source: elastic_amcache_applications_view + elastic_amcache_application_shortcut
-- Join: program_id = shortcut_program_id
-- Forensic value: Full application forensics with shortcut launch points
-- NOTE: Execution must be corroborated with additional artifacts

SELECT
  av.*,
  s.shortcut_path,
  s.shortcut_target_path,
  s.shortcut_aumid,
  datetime(av.timestamp, 'unixepoch') AS record_time
FROM elastic_amcache_applications_view AS av
LEFT JOIN elastic_amcache_application_shortcut AS s
  ON av.program_id = s.shortcut_program_id
WHERE av.name IS NOT NULL AND av.name != ''
ORDER BY av.timestamp DESC;
